feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] UAE leaves OPEC in blow to oil cartel amid war on Iran #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The United ‌Arab Emirates has announced it’s withdrawing from OPEC and OPEC+.

entry.title: Peso sinks past 61 vs $1, a new record low #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine peso fell to a fresh record low on Tuesday, breaching the 61-per-dollar level for the first time as a broadly stronger US dollar weighed on Asian currencies during a packed week of central bank meetings, including a Federal Reserve decision clouded by uncertainty over the Middle East conflict. The local

entry.title: AboitizPower Q1 earnings surged 71% #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Aboitiz Power Corp. started 2026 with a profit surge of 71 percent thanks to strong capacity buildout. The company said in a disclosure on Tuesday its net income rose to P7.9 billion from P4.6 billion a year earlier. The firm’s beneficial earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization also jumped by 35

entry.title: PAL maintained first-quarter profit despite Mideast woes #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine Airlines (PAL) emerged from the first quarter relatively unscathed, as sustained travel demand and strong cargo yields lifted its net income by 2.6 percent to $78.55 million. In a disclosure on Tuesday, the flag carrier said its first-quarter performance remained “solid.” This, despite the latter part of the period being weighed

entry.title: IREN Price Target Cut as Bernstein Sees Firm Dumping Bitcoin Mining for AI #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Bernstein analysts see IREN’s AI cloud prospects growing substantially in the coming years—and its Bitcoin business disappearing entirely.

entry.title: Ripple (XRP) Price Prediction as It Loses $1.40 Support: Is $1 Next? #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has broken below $1.40 and is trading around $1.38. The $1.40 level had been holding as support through most of April, but with Bitcoin sliding to $76,000 and the broader market in risk-off mode, XRP couldn’t hold it any longer. The XRP price has been struggling to climb above $1.45 for weeks ... Ripple (XRP) Price Prediction as It Loses $1.40 Support: Is $1 Next?

entry.title: Sprott Physical Copper Trust Announces Preliminary Proxy Results for Unitholder Meeting and Anticipated Listing Date on the NYSE Arca #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: This press release constitutes a “designated news release” for the purposes of the Sprott Physical Copper Trust’s prospectus supplement dated July 8, 2024 to its base shelf prospectus dated July 3, 2024. entry.title: Kyriba integrates USDC, Circle into treasury platform amid stablecoin regulation #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Kyriba's integration of USDC may stabilize corporate treasury use, but regulatory shifts could still impact stablecoin trust and market dynamics. The post Kyriba integrates USDC, Circle into treasury platform amid stablecoin regulation appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Rumors swirl over Mojtaba Khamenei’s death, Iran leadership change uncertain #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The uncertainty surrounding Iran's leadership succession could lead to increased political instability and market volatility. The post Rumors swirl over Mojtaba Khamenei’s death, Iran leadership change uncertain appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: SpaceX links Musk compensation package to Mars colony and orbital data center targets #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: SpaceX ties Musk pay to Mars colony and space data center goals as the company prepares for a potential $1.75T IPO. The post SpaceX links Musk compensation package to Mars colony and orbital data center targets appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: China condemns US sanctions on refineries linked to Iranian crude #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The US-China tensions over sanctions may hinder diplomatic progress, affecting global markets and geopolitical stability. The post China condemns US sanctions on refineries linked to Iranian crude appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: 11 California class-action settlements with payouts up to $5,000 that you can claim now #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Californians could have serious cash waiting for them as a wave of class action settlements remain open.

entry.title: 3 Altcoins Could Hit New All-Time Highs in May 2026 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: WhiteBIT, Tron, and Hyperliquid all sit within 33% of all-time highs with bullish setups pointing to new ATHs in May. The post 3 Altcoins Could Hit New All-Time Highs in May 2026 appeared first on BeInCrypto .

entry.title: American Electric Power declares 95-cent quarterly dividend #HowlStreet #Markets
